name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photos M82764 Black] This Capucines small wallet combines practicality with stylish design, made from soft full-grain Taurillon leather. It features eight card slots, a zip coin pocket, a bill compartment, and two slip pockets, with an LV snap closure for secure storage. 13.5 x 9.5 x 3 cm (Length x Height x Width)
